title: Thermo Vanquish + Orbitrap Exploris: intact-protein LC-MS (LC gradient)
description: Thermo reversed-phase gradient (25 to 80% B) for denaturing intact-protein / intact-mass LC-MS on MAbPac RP at 80 C (Thermo app note 73885).

payload.description: Reversed-phase UHPLC gradient for denaturing intact-protein / intact-mass LC-MS (demonstrated on trastuzumab, a monoclonal antibody) on a Thermo Vanquish Horizon, feeding an Orbitrap Exploris 480. Solvent A is water with 0.1% formic acid (v/v); solvent B is acetonitrile with 0.1% formic acid (v/v). Column: Thermo MAbPac RP, 4 um, 2.1 x 50 mm, at 80 C. Flow 250 uL/min (0.250 mL/min), constant. Injection 1 uL (1 ug trastuzumab). Linear gradient: 25% B held to 1 min, to 32% B at 9 min, to 80% B at 10 min, held to 11 min, back to 25% B at 12 min, re-equilibrate to 25 min. Pair with the matching MS setup template. Source: Thermo Fisher Application Note 73885, https://documents.thermofisher.com/TFS-Assets/CMD/Application-Notes/an-73885-lc-ms-characterization-mabs-native-denaturing-an73885-en.pdf . Representative starting-point method (denaturing intact conditions), verify against the source and tune per instrument and sample.
